task.name: customer perceives service degradation
system sends problem parameters list to customer service
service employee enters a problem report into system
service employee compares problem report to the customer SLA
service employee determines necessary counter measures
electronic service determines the customer significance
service employee links to an extra problem fix process
service employee creates a detailed problem report
service employee sends problem report to Service Management
service management deals with violations of quality
service management sends problem report to Resource Provisioning
service management performs the analysis
service management creates a trouble report
resource provisioning checks for potential issues
resource provisioning analyses the problem
resource provisioning creates a service execution notification
resource provisioning creates a trouble report
resource provisioning sends a status report to service management
service management prepares the final status report
service management sends actual service performance to the customer service
service management undertakes corrective actions
service management creates the problem resolution report
service management sends the problem resolution report to customer service
service managementcreates a request for automatic resource restoration
service management sends request to resource provisioning
resource provisioning receives the restoration request
recource provisioning tracks all possible errors
resource provisioning undertakes all necessary corrective actions
resource provisioning creates a trouble-shooting report
resource provisioning sends report to service management
service management sends trouble-shooting report to customer service
customer service receives the problem resolution report
customer service receives the actual service performance
customer service creates a report for customer
customer service reports an SLA violation rebate to billing & collections
billing & collections adjusts the billing
customer service sends report for the customer
customer receives the report
service management investigates the problem
